rationale: SCOPE: git show ce9f5395 = exactly 14 files (internal/panel|complete|bead), one commit, zero ADR edits (Bead 3's) — clean fence. PROVENANCE: every lens AC (AC2/3/4/7/8/9/10/11/12) maps to a real, named, passing test in refutation_test.go / panel_refuted_test.go / bdcli_test.go; I checked all 19 provenance-cited tests for existence and ran the plan's verification commands green. Two Provenance-table LABELS drifted from actual function names — AC2 cites TestWritePanelRefutedMetadata (actual TestPanelRefuted_WriteMetadata, panel_refuted_test.go:88) and AC11 cites TestPanelRefuted_CrossRun_WarnPathDoesNotDischarge (actual TestPanelRefuted_WarnPathDoesNotDischarge, :446). Both tests EXIST and PASS — this is doc-label drift, not an unmapped AC, so non-blocking. NO-REGRESSION: Decision-comparability fix (got!=want -> field-wise got.Action/Message) is outcome-preserving (matches all other callers; AppliedRefutations slice doesn't affect Action/Message); the 12 mechanical panelGate 3-tuple caller updates are pure `_` discards of the new []Refutation return; complete_test.go is 8 additive lines seeding an empty metadata map so reconcile no-ops for pre-existing tests (§6 fail-open), 0 deletions, no fixture-outcome flips beyond Bead-1's four. EMPIRICAL (/tmp clone, reads pinned to ce9f5395): go build OK, gofmt -l empty, go vet clean, full sweep panel/complete/bead/cmd/mindspec all ok, go test -race panel/complete/bead all ok.

findings.detail: Plan Provenance table (L1182 AC2, L1191 AC11 item 2) cites test names that drifted from the shipped function names: TestWritePanelRefutedMetadata -> actual TestPanelRefuted_WriteMetadata (panel_refuted_test.go:88); TestPanelRefuted_CrossRun_WarnPathDoesNotDischarge -> actual TestPanelRefuted_WarnPathDoesNotDischarge (panel_refuted_test.go:446). Both tests exist and pass, so the ACs ARE mapped; this is a doc-label mismatch only. Non-blocking on my lens. Optional: align the plan table (Bead 3 doc pass) or rename the funcs to match.

Decision struct gained AppliedRefutations []Refutation (non-comparable); the sole struct-equality site (internal/panel/panel_test.go) was correctly switched to field-wise Action+Message comparison. All 12 test panelGate call sites mechanically capture the new second return as `_`. complete_test.go seams completeGetMetadataFn to an empty map by default so reconcilePendingRefutations no-ops for legacy tests. Verified no outcome flips: complete_test.go has 0 deletions; grep for changed expected Action/verdict in non-refutation fixtures returned empty.
